docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZELAYA JOSE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $143.64 AS TO DEFENDANT ZELAYA JOSE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,210.25 FILED BY SAINZ JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT ZELAYA JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAINZ JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZELAYA JOSE $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 INTEREST, $29.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,079.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
